name: Blank canvas
input: Stats show instances but WebGPU canvas is black.
expected_behavior: Treats validation warnings/pixels as source of truth and investigates pipeline/resource/depth contracts.

name: Depth change
input: A pass adds depth attachment and one pipeline fails.
expected_behavior: Updates pass-wide attachment compatibility or splits phases; does not patch one pipeline blindly.

name: Performance claim
input: Renderer is faster under software fallback.
expected_behavior: Rejects fallback as performance oracle and asks for hardware profiling evidence.
